spec_to_plan.requirement: - R1: The notifier MUST send a notification for each recipient in the input list.
spec_to_plan.plan_quote: - P1: Implement send_all(recipients) that calls send() once per recipient.

spec_to_plan.requirement: - R2: The notifier MUST support a dry-run mode that returns the messages without sending them.
spec_to_plan.plan_quote: - P2: Implement dry-run mode in send_all(recipients, dry_run=False) that returns the messages without sending them.

plan_to_spec.plan_item: - P1: Implement send_all(recipients) that calls send() once per recipient.
plan_to_spec.spec_quote: - R1: The notifier MUST send a notification for each recipient in the input list.

plan_to_spec.plan_item: - P2: Implement dry-run mode in send_all(recipients, dry_run=False) that returns the messages without sending them.
plan_to_spec.spec_quote: - R2: The notifier MUST support a dry-run mode that returns the messages without sending them.
